reasoning: Shantanu is Matua, he stayed with one party and fought for us, unlike that Biswajit Das defector—accha, at least I know where Shantanu stands. The CAA rules are finally notified since March, so something is moving, even if slowly. TMC's people grab land, they took bribes in the SSC scam, and Mamata still hasn't given me clarity on the CAA—they just say it's a trap. Shantanu keeps saying 'vote for us, we'll finish it,' and maybe he means it, maybe the document queue will move faster now. I voted for him in 2019 on this promise, and even though only fourteen certificates came in four years, at least the legal fight is still happening with BJP. I'm not celebrating, but I'm not switching sides either.
primary_drivers: CAA document still my main need, rules notified in March, only BJP will push for it
Shantanu is Matua, loyal, better than TMC's non-Matua defector Biswajit Das
TMC's corruption clear, but their CAA alternative means no document at all
